# HttpFixer

> Free, browser-based HTTP developer tools. Fixers, not checkers.

HttpFixer generates exact copy-paste server config to fix HTTP header issues — for your specific stack (Nginx, Cloudflare, Vercel, Apache, Express, FastAPI, Next.js).

## Tools

- HeadersFixer: Scans live URL for missing/misconfigured security headers. Returns exact config for detected stack.
- CORSFixer: Sends real OPTIONS preflight. Returns exact CORS fix for detected framework.
- OAuthFixer: Diagnoses OAuth/OIDC errors (invalid_grant, redirect_uri_mismatch, PKCE failures).
- CSPFixer: Scans live page for all resource sources. Generates working CSP policy.
- EdgeFix: Audits Cache-Control, Vary, Age, X-Cache. Returns CDN caching fix.
- SpeedFixer: Live PageSpeed Insights audit. Returns Nginx/Cloudflare/Vercel config for each failing audit.
- Header Diff: Compares HTTP headers between two URLs side by side.
- Cache-Control Simulator: Visualises any Cache-Control value as a timeline.
- HSTS Preload Checker: Queries preload list and scans live HSTS header.

## Generators (no URL required)

- CSP Generator: /generators/csp/
- CORS Header Generator: /generators/cors/
- Permissions-Policy Generator: /generators/permissions-policy/
- Security Headers Generator: /generators/security-headers/

## Key constraints

- All processing is client-side — no data leaves the browser
- No signup, no accounts, no tracking
- MIT licensed — github.com/metriclogic26/httpfixer
- Live HTTP fetch is the AI moat — responses require fetching the actual URL

## Stack detection

HeadersFixer, SpeedFixer, and CORSFixer detect the server stack from the Server: response header and proxy headers (Cf-Ray, X-Vercel-ID, X-NF-Request-ID) and generate stack-specific output.

## Part of MetricLogic

- configclarity.dev — Server & DevOps tools
- domainpreflight.dev — Domain & email authentication
- httpfixer.dev — HTTP headers, CORS, CSP, OAuth (this site)
- metriclogic.dev — Network hub
